caption: A woman with dark hair, wearing a purple and white striped button-down shirt and large black over-ear headphones, is positioned in front of a plain light-colored wall. To her left, a window is partially covered by sheer yellow and blue curtains, and a light-colored surface is visible to her right. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the lower left corner of each frame. Throughout the sequence, the woman looks directly forward, speaking and moving her lips as she communicates. Her expression remains relatively consistent, though her mouth opens and closes in synchronization with her speech. The camera remains stationary, maintaining a medium close-up shot of the woman from the chest up, with no other people or significant changes to the environment visible across the duration of the clip.
